description: Lock composite_materials_carbon_fiber to modern high-performance carbon fibers and carbon-fiber reinforced polymer/composite systems, not all composite materials or generic construction.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to Roger Bacon's 1958 demonstration of high-performance carbon fibers at Union Carbide's Parma Technical Center.
The scoped CFRP/composite capability requires polymer matrix and precursor chemistry.
The broad advanced-synthetic-materials node is not a source-backed direct prerequisite for high-performance carbon fibers or CFRP.
Construction is an application domain for some composites, not a direct prerequisite for the scoped materials capability.
